title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Cleartrip Hotels

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Cleartrip Hotels
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, Cleartrip Hotels in Jabalpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Cleartrip Hotels:
Cleartrip Hotels is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Customer Relations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cleartrip Hotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
